subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh the truth is, verily, the Wronged One in this Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه لهو المظلوم فی هذا السجن
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God
